name: QR Code Component
description: Use this component to generate a QR-code containing a string on the device, which can then be drawn on compatible displays.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID with which you will be able to reference the QR-code later in your display code.

config_entries.label: Value
config_entries.description: The string which you want to encode in the QR-code.

config_entries.label: ECC
config_entries.description: The error correction code level you want to use. Defaults to `LOW`. You can use one of the following values:
